div.div:
GET /auth/google|github → Passport OAuth strategy → provider callback
→ findByProviderId(id): if found → login() directly
→ findByEmail(email): if email matches existing user → auto-link accounts → login()
→ if new user: usersService.create({email, googleId|githubId}) → login()
✔ Both register() and oauthLogin() call the idempotent ensurePersonalTeam()
(hardened 2026-07-03, PLAN #2) — no teamless OAuth users.
Callback redirect: ${FRONTEND_URL}/auth/oauth/callback?token={access_token}

rect.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(68, 68, 68), rgb(179, 179, 179));

div.div:
• isEmailAllowed(): invite-only guard — throws 403 ForbiddenException if email domain or address not in allowlist. Restricts public signups.
• Personal Team auto-creation: every password-registered user auto-gets a personal team (role: owner) at step ⑥, before login(). Cannot be skipped.
• OAuth team parity: both register() and oauthLogin() call the idempotent ensurePersonalTeam() (hardened 2026-07-03, PLAN #2) — the earlier "OAuth gap" note is obsolete.
• No email verification: registration immediately returns a valid JWT. No pending/unverified user state.
• plan on registration: the personal team defaults to plan: free — billing lives on teams since 2026-07-05 (Team-as-Tenant); plan is no longer in the JWT or login response. The ?plan= query param from the Quiz is a UI pre-selection only — NOT applied server-side during POST /auth/register.
• apps/landing has zero @insightstream/* package deps. Pure Next.js 16 + TailwindCSS + framer-motion + PostHog. No API calls from landing — all CTAs are plain links to app.insightstream.ai.
• Landing port 3002 (dev), insightstream.ai (prod). Web port 3000 (dev), app.insightstream.ai (prod). Both deployed to Vercel, independently.
